case_title: MONTGOMERY, GERALD L VS HOUSE OF LOUIE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,830.00 FILED BY MONTGOMERY, GERALD L AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSE OF LOUIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
